name: auto-refresh: failed refresh does NOT update last-fetch marker (so subsequent runs retry; status remains stale)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch && echo "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/x.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/auto-refresh-daily.sh" --now 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z --source-id x --upstream-stub "$PWD/fail.sh" 2>/dev/null && grep "2025-01-01" .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/x.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
